module-1-terminal-map-project.label: Pwojè: Kat Tèminal
module-1-terminal-map-project.summary: Trase yon ti katab pou yon pwojè nòt teren lè w itilize ls, cd, ak pwd pou w wè kote w ye epi deplase ant katab yo.

sketch0.title: Rezime pwojè nòt teren pou chan Terminal Map

project.title: Pwojè nòt teren pou chan Map Terminal

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Antre nan dosye pwojè a
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Ou ap ede yon ekip sondaj nan pak la trase yon kat tèminal ki egziste deja. Kouri ls, antre nan park-terminal-map, epi itilize pwd pou konfime ou rive nan dosye pwojè a.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè yo konekte. Konsantre sou kote ou ye, ki dosye ou ka wè, ak kote pou deplase apre.
help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak ls pou w ka wè dosye ou bezwen antre ladan l.
help.hint_2: Apre ou fin antre nan dosye pwojè a, kouri pwd pou konfime kote ou ye a.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

0.message: Lise espas travay la an premye ak ls.

2.message: Kouri pwd apre ou fin antre park-terminal-map.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current location checked with pwd and ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Jwenn dosye demann yo
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Nan `park-terminal-map`, fè lis sa ki la, ale nan demann yo, epi itilize `pwd` pou konfime ou jwenn nòt demann yo.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

help.concept: Yon fwa ou anndan yon dosye, ls montre sa ki disponib epi cd mennen ou pi fon nan kat la.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak ls andedan park-terminal-map anvan ou chwazi kote pou ale apre sa.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwd apre demann cd yo pou ou ka verifye non dosye a.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

2.message: Kouri pwd apre ou fin antre demann yo.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current location checked with pwd and ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Soti nan demann pou rive nan kat
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Soti nan demann yo, retounen nan plan-tèminal-pak la, antre nan kat yo, epi itilize pwd pou konfime ou rive nan nòt navigasyon yo.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

help.concept: cd .. moves you up one level, which is useful when you need to move from one sibling folder to another.
help.hint_1: Kite demann yo ak cd .. anvan ou eseye antre nan kat yo.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak pwd nan fen an pou w ka konfime ke maps se dosye kouran ou.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

0.message: Monte yon nivo pi wo an premye ak cd ..

1.message: Apre sa, pase nan kat yo.

2.message: Kouri pwd apre ou fin antre kat yo.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current location checked with pwd and ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

project-synopsis.title: Rezime pwojè nòt teren pou chan Terminal Map
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown: Ou ap ede yon ekip operasyon pak trase yon kat repèrtwa ki egziste deja anvan yon evènman volontè. Nan pwojè sa a, w ap itilize `ls` pou w wè sa ki disponib, `cd` pou w deplase ant repèrtwa yo, ak `pwd` pou w konfime kote w ye. Chak etap bati sou espas travay anvan an, kidonk konsantre w sou jwenn kote ki kòrèk la olye w kreye nouvo fichye.
